summary: Completed comprehensive code review and static analysis of referral system implementation. All required features are properly implemented with excellent code quality, security measures, and error handling.
passed_tests: Core referral functions (getOrCreateReferral, trackReferral, convertReferral, getReferrer, getReferralByCode) implemented correctly
Constants properly defined: MAX_REFERRALS=5, REWARD_DAYS=7, DISCOUNT_PERCENT=20
API endpoints (/api/v1/referral GET/POST) with proper authentication and validation
Frontend hook (useReferral) with all required functions
Landing page referral capture (?ref= param handling)
Pricing page referral section with proper conditional rendering
Billing integration with getReferrer and startAt parameter
Error handling and logging throughout the system
UI components with proper data-testid attributes
